posts.author: Mindflows_Jesuena (Jesuena Estoque Reimer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Join us as we present how to unlock the power of monday.com for law firms through our Legal Case Management Solution (LCMS) on September 12 at 10am PT / 1pm ET

Register here: https://wkf.ms/4e67bjs

Main Topics:

Managing your legal cases on monday.com

Automated task lists based on practice area

Customizable client portal

Aircall integration

Q&A

Who Should Attend:

  • Law firm administrators

  • Legal professionals

  • IT managers in legal settings

  • Anyone interested in optimizing their law firm’s operations

Don’t miss this opportunity to see how monday.com and a client portal can transform your firm’s operations and help you stay ahead in the legal industry.
